Original Source: http://chordsworld.com/pitbull-time-of-our-lives-chords/

I rewrote the chords here because chordsworld does not have the 'transpose' thing


Capo on 1st Fret
[ch]Am[/ch]      x02210    [ch]Em[/ch]   022000
[ch]B/C[/ch]     x2x01x    [ch]D[/ch]    xx0232
[ch]C[/ch]       x32010
